title: The Chocolate Update
description: This project adds Willy Wonka, chocolate armor and tools, cheese slice and cheese block, chocolate ore, chocolate block, bottle of chocolate, bucket of chocolate, four types of donut (base, pink, gold and tnt).
body:
I asked my subscribers for their dumb food ideas, and this mod is the result! 

This mod was my first ever mod, and it was done with MCreator. If you want to do your own mods and don't know how, MCreator is a great option!

This project adds Willy Wonka, chocolate armor and tools, cheese slice and cheese block, chocolate ore, chocolate block, bottle of chocolate, bucket of chocolate, four types of donut (base, pink, gold and tnt).

Check out the video I made at this link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=k6uKs7eqfBg
